BatteryCategoryEU.description: Battery category per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.
BatteryCategoryEU.title: BatteryCategoryEU

BatteryStatus.description: Battery status per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542, Article 14.
BatteryStatus.title: BatteryStatus

BatteryTestType.description: Controlled vocabulary for battery test types.
BatteryTestType.title: BatteryTestType

CellFormat.description: Physical format (geometry) of the battery cell.
CellFormat.title: CellFormat

CellGrade.description: Battery grade / reuse status per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.
CellGrade.title: CellGrade

CellInstance.description: A specific physical battery cell — one individual unit that can be tested. Links to a CellType specification and carries its own serial/batch identity.

ci_batch_id.description: Batch or lot identifier assigned during manufacturing.

ci_battery_status.description: Battery status per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.

ci_dataset_ids.description: IRIs of dataset records linked to this cell instance.

ci_expires_at.description: Shelf life expiry date (UNIX epoch or ISO 8601).

ci_grade.description: Cell grade / reuse status per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.

ci_id.description: Canonical IRI for this cell instance.

ci_measured.description: Measured properties for this individual cell (overrides CellType spec values where more precise measurements are available).

ci_name.description: Human-readable name or label for this cell instance — e.g. a lab batch ID. The primary identifier researchers use; usually present even when no manufacturer serial number is available.

ci_serial_number.description: Manufacturer serial number (unique within the product model); optional.

ci_service_start_date.description: ISO 8601 date when the cell was first placed in service.

ci_type_id.description: IRI of the CellType specification this instance conforms to.

CellInstance.title: CellInstance

CellProductType.description: Product maturity level of the cell.
CellProductType.title: CellProductType

CellType.description: A battery cell product specification: manufacturer, model, format, chemistry, and quantitative performance properties.

ct_battery_category.description: EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 battery category (LMT, EV, Industrial, Stationary, Portable, SLI).

ct_cell_format.description: Physical format (geometry) of the cell housing.

ct_country_of_origin.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of manufacturing origin.

ct_manufacturer.description: The company that manufactured this cell.

ct_model.description: Manufacturer's product model number or name.

ct_name.description: Full display name of the product (manufacturer + model).

ct_rechargeable.description: True for secondary (rechargeable) cells; false for primary.

ct_specs.description: Quantitative performance specification for this cell type.

ct_year.description: Model release or market introduction year.

id.description: Canonical IRI for this cell-spec record.

CellType.title: CellType

ConformanceStatus.description: Whether a test execution conformed to its specification. The verdict is boolean (conformant / non-conformant); 'unknown' marks a run that has not been assessed. Mapped to W3C EARL outcome values.
ConformanceStatus.title: ConformanceStatus

DataDistribution.description: A specific downloadable file distribution of the dataset.

dd_content_url.description: Direct download URL for this distribution file.

DataDistribution.title: DataDistribution

Dataset.description: A battery test dataset: a collection of time-series data files and metadata describing their content, provenance, and access conditions.

ds_about.description: IRIs of the cell types, cells, or tests this dataset is about.

ds_access_url.description: Landing page or direct download URL for the dataset.

ds_creators.description: People and organisations who created the dataset.

ds_description.description: Free-text description of the dataset contents.

ds_id.description: Canonical IRI for this dataset (typically a DOI URL or registry IRI).

ds_is_accessible_for_free.description: True if the dataset is publicly accessible at no cost.

ds_publisher.description: Organisation responsible for publishing the dataset.

ds_same_as.description: Equivalent persistent identifiers (DOI URL, Zenodo record URL, etc.).

Dataset.title: Dataset

Deviation.description: A single deviation from the test specification.

dev_description.description: Description of what deviated from the specification.

dev_impact.description: Assessed impact of this deviation on data quality.

dev_step.description: The protocol step where the deviation occurred.

Deviation.title: Deviation

Organization.description: A manufacturer, brand, or research organisation.
Organization.title: Organization

PersonOrOrganization.description: A person or organisation acting as creator, publisher, or funder.
PersonOrOrganization.title: PersonOrOrganization

ProtocolInfo.description: Human-readable name and optional URL of a test protocol standard.

protocol_name.description: Human-readable name of the protocol standard.

protocol_url.description: URL pointing to the protocol specification document.

ProtocolInfo.title: ProtocolInfo

Provenance.description: Tracks the origin and curation history of a record.

curated_by.description: ORCID or name of the person who curated this record.

retrieved_at.description: Epoch timestamp when the record was retrieved/ingested.

source_url.description: URL of the original source document.

workflow_version.description: Version of the ingestion workflow that created this record.

Provenance.title: Provenance

SpecSet.description: Harmonised set of quantitative battery cell properties. Each field is a SpecValue (value + unit), identified by its EMMO IRI.

calendar_life.description: Calendar storage lifetime to end-of-life criterion.

capacity_fade.description: Capacity fade rate per cycle or per year.

capacity_threshold_exhaustion.description: Capacity threshold defining battery exhaustion per EU Battery Regulation.

certified_usable_energy.description: Certified usable energy per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.

charging_cutoff_voltage.description: Charge cutoff voltage (alias: upper voltage limit).

charging_time.description: Time to charge from 0% to 100% SOC at standard rate.

cycle_life.description: Number of cycles to rated end-of-life criterion.

cycle_life_c_rate.description: C-rate used in the cycle life test.

dc_internal_resistance.description: DC internal resistance measured by current-interrupt method.

energy_density.description: Volumetric energy density (energy per unit volume).

height.description: Height of the cell (cylindrical: total length; prismatic: z-dimension).

initial_coulombic_efficiency.description: Coulombic efficiency on the first formation cycle.

length.description: Length of the cell (prismatic / pouch cells).

maximum_charging_temperature.description: Maximum allowed cell temperature during charging.

maximum_discharging_temperature.description: Maximum allowed cell temperature during discharging.

minimum_charging_temperature.description: Minimum allowed cell temperature during charging.

minimum_discharging_temperature.description: Minimum allowed cell temperature during discharging.

nominal_capacity.description: Nominal (rated) discharge capacity at standard conditions.

power_energy_ratio.description: Ratio of rated power to rated energy.

rated_capacity.description: Capacity rated by the manufacturer (may differ from typical).

round_trip_energy_efficiency.description: Ratio of discharge energy to charge energy (full charge-discharge cycle).

round_trip_energy_efficiency_50pct.description: Round-trip efficiency measured at 50% state of charge.

self_discharge_rate.description: Self-discharge rate (capacity loss per unit time in storage).

specific_energy.description: Gravimetric energy density (energy per unit mass).

state_of_health.description: State of health (ratio of current to original capacity).

upper_voltage_limit.description: Upper voltage safety limit (synonym for charging cutoff voltage).

width.description: Width of the cell (prismatic / pouch cells).

SpecSet.title: SpecSet

SpecValue.description: A scalar quantity with an optional measurement unit.  Used for all quantitative battery properties in SpecSet.

sv_value_text.description: Free-text value representation when numeric is unavailable.

SpecValue.title: SpecValue

Test.description: A battery test execution (prov:Activity).  Links to the cell instance tested (hasTestObject) and to the test specification used (prov:used).

t_artifacts.description: Links to machine-actionable protocol/vendor files produced by or executed in this test (the actionable layer). Each entry is a JSON object with role/format/locator and optional checksum.

t_cell_id.description: IRI of the cell instance that was tested (hasTestObject).

t_conformance.description: Conformance assessment for this test execution.

t_dataset_ids.description: IRIs of dataset records produced by this test.

t_description.description: Free-text description of this specific test run.

t_id.description: Canonical IRI for this test execution.

t_instrument.description: Name or model of the test instrument/cycler (hasTestEquipment).

t_kind.description: Test type from the BatteryTestType controlled vocabulary.

t_name.description: Human-readable label for this test execution.

t_protocol.description: Reference protocol used (may differ from the linked TestSpec).

t_protocol_id.description: IRI of the TestSpec (plan) used for this execution.

t_status.description: Execution status (planned, running, completed, aborted, other).

Test.title: Test

TestConformance.description: Records how closely this test execution conformed to its specification.

tc_note.description: Free-text note explaining the conformance assessment.

tc_status.description: Conformance status from the ConformanceStatus vocabulary.

TestConformance.title: TestConformance

TestSpec.description: A test protocol specification (plan) that defines the procedure for a battery test.  Referenced by Test instances via prov:used.

ts_artifacts.description: Links to machine-actionable protocol files (the actionable layer). Each entry is a JSON object with role/format/locator and optional checksum.

ts_conditions.description: Protocol-level ambient conditions as a JSON object of typed quantities (e.g. {"temperature": {"value": 25, "unit": "degC"}}).

ts_cycles.description: Number of times the authored step sequence is repeated (becomes an IterativeWorkflow group in ts_method).

ts_id.description: Canonical IRI for this test specification.

ts_kind.description: Test type from the BatteryTestType controlled vocabulary.

ts_method.description: Canonical structured method: an ordered, typed list of steps as a JSON array. Each step carries mode/direction, setpoints, termination and optional nested groups; emitted to JSON-LD as an EMMO process graph.

ts_name.description: Human-readable name of the test protocol.

ts_protocol.description: Reference to the formal protocol standard document.

ts_record.description: Protocol-level default data-recording cadence as a JSON object (e.g. {"time_s": 10}).

ts_safety.description: Global instrument safety limits as a JSON object, distinct from per-step termination (e.g. {"max_voltage_V": 4.3, "min_voltage_V": 2.4}).

ts_steps.description: PyBaMM-compatible experiment step strings (the default human authoring interface, e.g. "Discharge at 1C until 2.5 V"). Parsed into ts_method on ingest; ts_method is the canonical stored form.

ts_version.description: Version string of this protocol specification.

TestSpec.title: TestSpec
